*_override.tf
*_override.tf.json

.terraformrc
plan.out
tfplan*

# Local environment variables
.env
.env.*
*.env

# IDE / Editor
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# Logs
logs/
*.log

dist/
build/

target/
out/

coverage/
